title: garcinia pluvialis
intro: Garcinia pluvialis, also known as the yellow mangosteen, is a tropical plant species native to Southeast Asia and India, belonging to the family Clusiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. Garcinia pluvialis is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing blood sugar levels, improving digestion, and supporting weight loss. The plant is typically used to prepare herbal teas, capsules, and extracts, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
